Goals of MCAH – San Benito County Health and Human Services Agency

Mon - Fri: 8:00am - 5:00pm
List Item
DISCLAIMER
The mission of San Benito County’s Health & Human Services Agency is to support and strengthen individuals and families by assuring safety, promoting self-sufficiency, eliminating poverty, and improving the quality of life in our community.
Hollister, California
Goals of MCAH
Goal #1
Maintain and update the comprehensive MCAH resource and referral guide as needed
Goal #2
To connect with local families to understand the needs of Child & Youth with Special Health Care Needs
Goal #3
Update and recommend SIDS/SUIDS related resources and safe practices to the community
Goal #4
Monitor and track breastfeeding initiation and duration rates in this county and disseminate data to community partners
Goal #5
Link and refer local maternal, child, and adolescent people to safety net and Medical services
Goal #6
Increase the knowledge and awareness of mental health & services in San Benito County
Goal #7
Ensure that all women in San Benito County are healthy before, during and after pregnancy
Goal #8
Partner with local hospital and community stakeholders to disseminate social media campaigns about preterm birth reductions strategies
Goal #9
Partner with the Oral Health Program to obtain decay rates, dental visits, and prevention of childhood caries through prevention activities
Goal #10
Improve coordination of emergency preparedness and disaster relief support for children and youth with special needs
Goal #11
Maintain and update a MCAH Website
Goal #12
Partner with Safe Kids Coalition to reduce childhood injuries through injury prevention strategies and best practices
1111 San Felipe Road, Hollister, CA 95023

Our Agency’s website links to Google Translation as a convenience for those who speak/read languages other than English.  Please be aware that no automated or computerized translation tool produces a perfect translation.  The context of the wording may be lost when translated and some translations may lose the intended meaning. Therefore, the San Benito County Health and Human Services Agency cannot guarantee the accuracy of the translated content.
If any  questions arise concerning the translated version of the website, please refer to the original English version.
